exercises.name: Landmine Low Lateral Lunge
exercises.alternateName: Landmine Low Grip Side Lunge Single leg
exercises.description:
Hold the barbell with one hand at chest height. Step out to the side into a lunge, keeping the other leg straight. 

Push back to the starting position. Alternate sides.

exercises.name: Landmine Lunge to Press
exercises.alternateName: Landmine single leg reverse Lunge to shoulder Press
exercises.description: Lunge forward and press the bar overhead as you rise from the lunge. Alternate sides.

exercises.name: Landmine Narrow Stance Hack Squats
exercises.description: Landmine Narrow Stance Hack Squats

exercises.name: Landmine Offset Deadlift to Press
exercises.alternateName: Landmine split stance, b stance, kickstand Deadlift to Press
exercises.description: Deadlift the bar and immediately press it overhead in one movement. Keep core tight throughout.

exercises.name: Landmine Offset Squat
exercises.description:
Hold the barbell with one hand at chest height. 

Perform a squat, focusing on maintaining balance and engaging your core. Alternate the holding hand.

exercises.name: Landmine Overhead Hold
exercises.description: Hold the bar overhead with both hands. Keep arms locked out and maintain the hold for time, focusing on shoulder and core stability.

exercises.name: Landmine Overhead Squat
exercises.description: Hold the bar overhead with both hands. Squat down as deeply as mobility allows while keeping the bar stable overhead.

exercises.name: Landmine Pistol Squat
exercises.description: Hold the bar in one hand. Stand on one leg and lower into a pistol squat. Use the bar for balance and assistance.

exercises.name: Landmine Pivot Press
exercises.description: Hold the bar and pivot your rear foot as you press the bar across your body. Involves full-body rotation.

exercises.name: Landmine Plank Position Row
exercises.description: Landmine Plank Position Row

exercises.name: Landmine Plank Row
exercises.alternateName: Landmine plank single arm renegade row
exercises.description: In a plank position, row the bar with one hand while keeping hips stable. Alternate arms.

exercises.name: Landmine Power Clean
exercises.description: Drive the bar upward using full-body power, similar to a clean, but more focused on speed and explosiveness.

exercises.name: Landmine Press
exercises.description: Stand facing the landmine with the barbell end in both hands at chest level. Feet shoulder-width apart. Press the bar upward and forward until arms are fully extended. Lower with control. Great for shoulders and chest.

exercises.name: Landmine Push Press
exercises.description: Hold the bar at shoulder height. Dip slightly and drive the bar overhead using power from your legs.

exercises.name: Landmine RDL
exercises.description: Landmine RDL

exercises.name: Landmine RDL
exercises.description: Hold the bar with both hands. Hinge at the hips with a flat back, lowering the bar while keeping the bar close to your legs. Squeeze glutes to stand.

exercises.name: Landmine Rear Delt Fly
exercises.description: Bend at the hips with a flat back, holding the bar in one hand. Raise the arm out to the side in a reverse fly motion, targeting the rear delts. Lower with control.

exercises.name: Landmine Reverse Lunge
exercises.alternateName: landmine single leg step back lunge
exercises.description: Hold the bar at chest level. Step out laterally into a side lunge, keeping the bar centered. Push back to the start position.

exercises.name: Landmine Rollout
exercises.description: Hold the bar end with both hands from a kneeling or standing position. Roll the bar forward, extending your body, then pull it back.

exercises.name: Landmine Romanian Deadlift
exercises.description:
Place one end of a barbell into a landmine attachment. 

Stand facing the barbell, grab it with both hands, and hinge at the hips to lower the barbell. 

Return to standing by engaging your glutes and hamstrings.

exercises.name: Landmine Rotation
exercises.description: Hold the barbell with both hands. Rotate your torso from side to side, keeping your core engaged and controlling the movement.

exercises.name: Landmine Rotation Lunge
exercises.description: Hold the bar at shoulder height. Step forward into a lunge and rotate your torso over the front leg. Return and repeat.

exercises.name: Landmine Rotation To Press
exercises.description:
Hold the barbell with both hands. Rotate your torso to one side, then return to center and press the barbell overhead. 

Repeat on the other side.

exercises.name: Landmine Rotational Clean and Press
exercises.description: Clean the bar to your shoulder using hip drive, then rotate and press across the body. Repeat fluidly.

exercises.name: Landmine Rotational Press
exercises.description: Start in an athletic stance holding the bar with both hands near one shoulder. Rotate your torso and press the bar across your body to the opposite side. Return to start. Repeat and switch sides.

exercises.name: Landmine Rotations
exercises.description: Hold the end of the bar with both hands and rotate it side-to-side in a controlled arc. Keep core engaged.

exercises.name: Landmine Russian Twist
exercises.description: Sit down and hold the bar with both hands. Rotate your torso side-to-side like a Russian twist, tapping the bar end to the floor.

exercises.name: Landmine Shoulder Press
exercises.description:
Hold the barbell with one hand at shoulder height. 

Press the barbell upward and slightly forward. 

Lower with control and alternate arms.

exercises.name: Landmine Shoulder to Shoulder Press
exercises.description: Hold the barbell with both hands close to your chest. Shift the bar from one shoulder to the other in a pressing arc, alternating sides. Keep elbows slightly bent and core engaged.

exercises.name: Landmine Side Bend
exercises.description: Hold the bar and bend laterally at the waist. Focus on stretching and strengthening the obliques.

exercises.name: Landmine Side Lunge
exercises.description: Hold the bar at chest level. Step out laterally into a side lunge, keeping the bar centered. Push back to the start position.

exercises.name: Landmine Side Plank Hold
exercises.description: Hold the bar with one hand while in a side plank. Maintain the position to strengthen the obliques and shoulders.

exercises.name: Landmine Side-to-Side Lateral Squat
exercises.description: Landmine Side-to-Side Lateral Squat

exercises.name: Landmine Single Arm Bicep Curl
exercises.description: Stand facing the bar and hold with an underhand grip. Curl the bar toward your shoulders, keeping elbows tucked. Squeeze the biceps at the top, then lower slowly.

exercises.name: Landmine Single Arm Bicep Row
exercises.description: With a bent-over stance, hold the bar with an underhand grip (palms up). Row the barbell toward your lower chest, squeezing shoulder blades together. Control the descent.

exercises.name: Landmine Single Arm Push Press
exercises.alternateName: Landmine single arm power shoulder push
exercises.description:
Similar to the push press but performed with one arm. 

Use your legs to assist in driving the barbell overhead. 

Alternate arms.

exercises.name: Landmine Single Arm Row
exercises.description: Stand beside the bar. Hinge at the hips and hold the bar with the inside hand. Row the bar up toward your hip, keeping your elbow close. Pause, then lower. Switch sides.

exercises.name: Landmine Single Arm Row
exercises.description:
Hold the barbell with one hand while in a bent-over position. 

Pull the barbell toward your chest, keeping your elbow close to your body. 

Alternate arms.

exercises.name: Landmine Single Arm Shoulder Press
exercises.description:
1)  When performing this exercise, ensure a stable base and a stable position with your feet. 

2) Keep your core engaged as you press and lock out with your arm. 

3) Make sure that as you press, your arm is in line with your body.
